_backup.note: Full export of a recorded workflow for restore. Contains the workflow row (metadata + embedded steps) and its template_data. Restore by re-creating the workflow + steps (or re-inserting the rows) on the backend.

steps.intent:

" into "Get started by typing anything here"

Lead Database Administrator
APPLY NOW

steps.value:
Buscar candidatos para:
Lead Database Administrator
APPLY NOW
Modality
Full-time / Employee
Job Location
Costa Rica
WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING
• Design, build, and maintain scalable data lake architectures to support analytics, reporting, and data-driven decision-making
• Manage data ingestion pipelines, enforcing data quality and governance standards
• Manage, monitor, and maintain all databases, including Microsoft Access, SQL Server, MySQL, and PostgreSQL
• Maintain a comprehensive inventory of all databases, including ownership, usage, and technology stack
• Perform routine database administration tasks, including backups, restores, copying, archiving, and schema updates
• Ensure database availability, integrity, and reliability across all environments
• Monitor and tune database performance to ensure optimal response times and resource utilization
• Analyze and optimize queries, focusing on improving performance in VB-based applications
• Proactively identify and resolve database bottlenecks and performance issues
• Implement indexing strategies, query optimization, and execution plan analysis
• Lead and support the migration of Microsoft Access databases to SQL Server, MySQL, and PostgreSQL
• Collaborate with the Principal Architect and product teams to define migration strategies and timelines
• Document legacy database structures and develop migration plans that minimize disruption to operations
• Evaluate and recommend modern database technologies and architectures
• Partner with development teams to establish and enforce database query best practices
• Provide hands-on guidance and code review for database interactions within applications
• Create and maintain documentation, standards, and reference guides for database development
• Serve as a technical resource for developers on schema design, stored procedures, and data modeling
• Implement and manage database monitoring and alerting solutions to detect and respond to issues
• Define and track key database health metrics, including performance, storage, and availability
• Respond to and resolve database incidents, performing root cause analysis and implementing preventive measures
• Maintain audit logs and ensure compliance with data governance and security policies
• Manage database access controls, user permissions, and role-based security
• Ensure sensitive data is protected in accordance with organizational and regulatory requirements
• Perform regular security assessments and vulnerability reviews of database environments
• Analyze and optimize queries, with a focus on improving performance in VB-based applications
WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR
• 5+ years of experience in database administration or a related role
• Strong proficiency in Microsoft SQL Server and Microsoft Access
• Experience with database migration projects, particularly Access to SQL Server
• Proficiency in T-SQL, query optimization, and execution plan analysis
• Experience with .NET application database interactions
• Familiarity with database monitoring and alerting tools
• Knowledge of backup, recovery, and archiving strategies
• Strong understanding of database security, access control, and compliance practices
• Excellent communication and collaboration skills with both technical and non-technical stakeholders
• Very good English level and communication skills, as the role involves interfacing with high-level executives
WHAT WOULD BE A PLUS?
• Proficiency with SQL database performance tuning, including the use of Plan Cache, Extended Events, or the Activity Monitor to troubleshoot issues and identify bottlenecks.

success_condition.value:
Buscar candidatos para:
Lead Database Administrator
APPLY NOW
Modality
Full-time / Employee
Job Location
Costa Rica
WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING
• Design, build, and maintain scalable data lake architectures to support analytics, reporting, and data-driven decision-making
• Manage data ingestion pipelines, enforcing data quality and governance standards
• Manage, monitor, and maintain all databases, including Microsoft Access, SQL Server, MySQL, and PostgreSQL
• Maintain a comprehensive inventory of all databases, including ownership, usage, and technology stack
• Perform routine database administration tasks, including backups, restores, copying, archiving, and schema updates
• Ensure database availability, integrity, and reliability across all environments
• Monitor and tune database performance to ensure optimal response times and resource utilization
• Analyze and optimize queries, focusing on improving performance in VB-based applications
• Proactively identify and resolve database bottlenecks and performance issues
• Implement indexing strategies, query optimization, and execution plan analysis
• Lead and support the migration of Microsoft Access databases to SQL Server, MySQL, and PostgreSQL
• Collaborate with the Principal Architect and product teams to define migration strategies and timelines
• Document legacy database structures and develop migration plans that minimize disruption to operations
• Evaluate and recommend modern database technologies and architectures
• Partner with development teams to establish and enforce database query best practices
• Provide hands-on guidance and code review for database interactions within applications
• Create and maintain documentation, standards, and reference guides for database development
• Serve as a technical resource for developers on schema design, stored procedures, and data modeling
• Implement and manage database monitoring and alerting solutions to detect and respond to issues
• Define and track key database health metrics, including performance, storage, and availability
• Respond to and resolve database incidents, performing root cause analysis and implementing preventive measures
• Maintain audit logs and ensure compliance with data governance and security policies
• Manage database access controls, user permissions, and role-based security
• Ensure sensitive data is protected in accordance with organizational and regulatory requirements
• Perform regular security assessments and vulnerability reviews of database environments
• Analyze and optimize queries, with a focus on improving performance in VB-based applications
WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR
• 5+ years of experience in database administration or a related role
• Strong proficiency in Microsoft SQL Server and Microsoft Access
• Experience with database migration projects, particularly Access to SQL Server
• Proficiency in T-SQL, query optimization, and execution plan analysis
• Experience with .NET application database interactions
• Familiarity with database monitoring and alerting tools
• Knowledge of backup, recovery, and archiving strategies
• Strong understanding of database security, access control, and compliance practices
• Excellent communication and collaboration skills with both technical and non-technical stakeholders
• Very good English level and communication skills, as the role involves interfacing with high-level executives
WHAT WOULD BE A PLUS?
• Proficiency with SQL database performance tuning, including the use of Plan Cache, Extended Events, or the Activity Monitor to troubleshoot issues and identify bottlenecks.

analysis.workflow_goal: The user is attempting to search for candidates for a Lead Database Administrator position using multiple platforms.
analysis.workflow_summary: This workflow involves navigating through LinkedIn and Google to gather information about job openings and then prompting the user to create an inquiry for potential candidates. It captures inputs related to job descriptions and candidate searches.

phases.phase_goal: Access LinkedIn and get started with candidate search
Navigate to Google to search for a specific job opening
Access specific job requirements from the careers page
Prepare requests for candidate outreach based on job details
Conduct a final search on LinkedIn to find suitable candidates

parameters.description: Search term used to find job openings.

parameters.default:
Lead Database Administrator
APPLY NOW
Modality
Full-time
parameters.description: Details regarding the job requirements and context.

phases.goal: Access LinkedIn and get started with candidate search
phases.name: Initial LinkedIn Engagement

phases.goal: Navigate to Google to search for a specific job opening
phases.name: Job Search on Google

phases.goal: Access specific job requirements from the careers page
phases.name: Retrieve Job Requirements

phases.goal: Prepare requests for candidate outreach based on job details
phases.name: Candidate Queries Preparation

phases.goal: Conduct a final search on LinkedIn to find suitable candidates
phases.name: Final Candidate Search on LinkedIn

parameters.default:
Lead Database Administrator
APPLY NOW
Modality
Full-time
